## Why Eton?
####  We're Focused 
Business valuations are subjective and complex. To be robust and audit defensible, you need experienced experts in your corner. At Eton, we do nothing but valuations—it's our speciality.
####  We’re Human 
Should things turn contentious, our valuations are justifiable in court. We use expert human judgment and robust methodologies that no automated valuation could deliver.
####  We’re Trusted 
We've done thousands of business valuations for leading startups, VC firms, legal teams, accountants and high-net worth individuals. Our customer-centric approach to business keeps them coming back.
### End-to-end business appraisal services
## Our Valuation Services
Our valuation and advisory services are built around your specific needs. Each valuation results in a thorough report that provides a detailed overview of your business, drivers of value, valuation and our justification for it. 
We use professional judgment and advanced analytical techniques to deliver a robust, defensible valuation. Should it be challenged, we’ll provide additional support and defend our valuation.

## Our Leadership
![](https://etonvs.com/)
#### Chris Walton, JD
#### President & CEO
[ Linkedin-in ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cswalton/)
[ Learn More ](https://etonvs.com/author/cwalton/)
**Chris Walton, JD** , is President and CEO and co-founded Eton Venture Services in 2010 to provide mission-critical valuations to private companies. He leads a team that collaborates closely with each client’s leadership, board of directors, internal / external counsel, and independent auditors to develop detailed financial models and create accurate, audit-ready valuations.
Chris has led thousands of valuations, including for equity securities, intangible assets, contingent considerations, financial instruments, investment valuations, convertible debt, business valuations for tax compliance purposes and financial reporting compliance requirements, as well as fairness and solvency opinions.
![](https://etonvs.com/)
#### Colton Owens, CFA
#### Director of valuation
[ Linkedin-in ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/coltonrowens/)
[ Learn More ](https://etonvs.com/author/cowens/)
**Colton Owens, CFA,** serves as Director of Valuation at Eton Venture Services and is responsible for managing client relationships, new business development, and delivering tailored audit-defensible valuation solutions to companies.
He specializes in valuations for a wide range of sponsor-backed, public and private company clients, from pre-revenue startups to upper middle-market firms, addressing financial reporting, tax, and transaction opinion valuation needs.

**Dalton Luong** is Manager of Valuation at Eton Venture Services, responsible for oversight of a variety of valuation engagements, including business enterprises, intangible assets, and purchase price allocations.
He provides technical guidance and reviews valuation models and reports for compliance with applicable standards. Alongside the leadership team, he identifies and grows new business opportunities for the firm.

## FAQs
##  Why should I choose Eton's rather than a large "big 4" provider?
Eton’s team is filled with ex-big 4 consultants and highly-trained legal professionals. However, we’re a boutique firm meaning we provide superior service quality and more affordable prices than larger firms can.
##  What methodologies will be used?
Determining the most suitable methodology for a valuation depends on the unique circumstances of the company and the specifics of the project. Key considerations include the company’s funding history, historical and projected financial performance, and the anticipated timing of any liquidity event.
Learn more about our approach to methodologies here:
  * [409A process & methodologies](https://etonvs.com/409a-valuation/409a-valuation-process-and-methodologies)
  * [M&A valuation methods & why your narrative matters](https://etonvs.com/ma/m-and-a-valuation-techniques/)


##  Who performs your valuation services?
Our valuations are performed by our in-house team of highly experienced, certified business valuation specialists. Our team of ex-lawyers and big 4 consultants ensure our services are robust, audit-ready and professional.
##  How much do our valuation services cost?
Our standard valuations typically cost between $2000 and $10,000, but complex cases and large transactions can be significantly more expensive. Our [M&A valuation support](https://etonvs.com/services/ma-valuation-support/) pricing varies significantly, please reach out to us for details.

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
What’s the best way to borrow to make consumer purchases?
For tax years 2018 through 2025 interest on home equity loans is only deductible when the loan is used to buy, build or substantially improve the taxpayer’s home that secures the loan. Prior to 2018, many homeowners took out home equity loans. Unlike other consumer-related interest expenses (e.g., car loans and credit cards) interest on a home equity loan was deductible on your tax return. 
What special deductions can I get if I’m self-employed?
You may be able to take an immediate Section 179 expense deduction of up to $1,040,000 for 2020 ($1,020,000 in 2019), for equipment purchased for use in your business, instead of writing it off over many years. There is a phaseout limit of $2,590,000 in 2020 ($2,550,000 in 2019). Additionally, self-employed individuals can deduct 100 percent of their health insurance premiums. You may also be able to establish a Keogh, SEP or SIMPLE IRA plan and deduct your contributions (investments). 
Why should I participate in my employer’s cafeteria plan or FSA?
In 2020 (as in 2019), medical and dental expenses are deductible to the extent they exceed 10 percent of your adjusted gross income or AGI. If your employer offers a Flexible Spending Account (FSA), Health Savings Account or cafeteria plan, these plans permit you to redirect a portion of your salary to pay these types of expenses with pre-tax dollars. 
What’s the best way to give to charity?
If you’re planning to make a charitable gift, it generally makes more sense to give appreciated long-term capital assets to the charity, instead of selling the assets and giving the charity the after-tax proceeds. Donating the assets instead of the cash avoids capital gains tax on the sale, and you can obtain a tax deduction for the full fair-market value of the property.

# The fastest way to finance software and hardware
Choose Capchase as your financing partner to close deals faster and increase your earnings. Approve your buyer, configure your offer, and win your deal in minutes.
[Book a call](https://www.capchase.com/demo)
Trusted by over 10,000 vendors & buyers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2bfd6294531eb547b806e_gradient-1.webp)
### Buyers expect payment options
82% of U.S. companies use financing for equipment and software. If you don’t offer it, you risk losing the deal.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2c0d038469984e1c349d7_image-2.webp)
### Financing is often the roadblock
Clunky, slow, and unreliable processes stall sales. Done right, financing accelerates deals and keeps you in control.
### Capchase makes financing easier
Close high-velocity or high-complexity transactions in minutes, not weeks. Reseller partner approved.
## Experience the Capchase advantage
Embedded vendor financing that delivers faster approvals, easy deal configurations, and real-time deal status–right where you work.
For Sales
### Close more deals at a higher value
Use flexible payment options as a competitive advantage. Whether your customer prefers monthly, quarterly, or extended net terms - give them the choice they want.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/sales)

Offer payment flexibility while still getting paid upfront on every deal—including multi-year and reseller deals—eliminating billing headaches and putting an end to chasing payments.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/finance)
## Win-win for your business, partners, and customers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2da91024544ae491cae81_webp.webp)

Get paid upfront, empower customers with flexible payments, and leave the collections burden to us. Partner channel approved.

Allow your customers to optimize their cash flow while still purchasing the tech they need to be successful.

## Consulting Solutions
# Engage the  
Power of Kranz.
We are the preeminent accounting and financial solutions firm helping start-ups and Venture Capital companies grow. We believe that every business, at every stage of growth, is a story waiting to be told – and that all companies deserve to reach their full potential.
[What We Do](https://kranz.consulting/services/)
### Who We Are
## We give our clients a competitive advantage.
We deliver seasoned perspectives and insights, from the latest in Artificial Intelligence to M&A trends, the state of capital markets, and even the future of work. In a world of mounting uncertainty and complexity, knowledge is not just power, but peace of mind.
We value mutual respect and true human connections beyond all else because those are the only connections that truly matter. Our trusted relationships are the common thread that guides everything we do.
[Who We Are](https://kranz.consulting/about-us/)

# AI Pitch Deck Generator & Co-Pilot for Entrepreneurs
Say goodbye to the "blank page problem"! Chat with the AI bot to quickly shape your business idea, refine your pitch, and accelerate your startup journey — see [how it works](https://www.youtube.com/@pitchbobio), learn [why ChatGPT alone can’t do the same](https://pitchbob.io/#faq-gpt), and discover [what you get](https://pitchbob.io/what-you-get).

🌱
First-time founder, student, or corporate innovator?
Shape, validate, and package your business idea from scratch — [all in one chat](https://pitchbob.io/#pricing) with our bot. Includes 📜 [founder agreement](https://pitchbob.io/products/founders-agreement-equity-tracker), 🧮 monthly co-founder contribution tracking. Zero to one, tons of artifacts. From a one-time $29.9.
[PICK A PLAN](https://pitchbob.io/#pricing)
📄
Already have a pitch deck or one-pager?
Don’t want to chat with the bot but need all the docs? Or want them in another language? Just 📥 [drop your file in the chat](https://pitchbob.io/products/improve-pitch-deck) — the bot handles the rest and emails everything to you. Flat one-time $99. No hassle.
[Improve my pitch](https://pitchbob.io/products/improve-pitch-deck)
💰
Fundraising-mode founder or grant-seeking entrepreneur?
We’ve got you covered: start with honest human 💬 [feedback on your idea](https://pitchbob.io/services/startup-feedback), then check if you’re eligible for 🇪🇺 [startup grants in Europe](https://pitchbob.io/services/grants). Get hands-on support from our [founder mentorship & tracking program ](https://pitchbob.io/services/startup-mentorship-and-tracking)or activate our 📬 [investor & client outreach team](https://pitchbob.io/services/outreach-team) to accelerate your journey. Use what you need, when you need it.
🔁
Working on your startup long-term?
Need structure, discipline, and a continuous improvement mindset? 🧭 [PitchBob Founders Co-Pilot](https://pitchbob.io/products/ai-startup-founders-co-pilot) supports your monthly rhythm with planning, reflection, and auto-generated founder/stakeholder reports. From $19.9/month.
🏢
Corporation, university, accelerator, VC fund, incubator, or government hub?
We offer 🏷️ [white-label](https://pitchbob.io/services/white-label) solutions starting from $99/month, 📊 [VC pipeline scoring](https://pitchbob.io/products/vc) scoring, 🔎 [free startup scouting](https://pitchbob.io/services/scout-startup), and 🎁 [perk partnerships](https://pitchbob.io/blog/perk-partnership-proposition-for-startup-accelerators-and-incubators) for your community.
